subcodes.first_line: O My handmaid! Know thou that We have raised up bounty itself in the form of this Tablet and sent it unto thee, that thou mayest glory therein amidst creation
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی فاعلمی انا بعثنا العنایه علی هیکل اللوح و ارسلناه الیک لتفتخری به
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @cleanliness and refinement, @chastisement and requital, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God
